name: protective_devices
description: Protective devices from Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules (pp.54-55). A character may wear no more than one piece of armor and one screen.

rules.note: A character may wear no more than one piece of armor and one screen.

armor_categories.name: Armor
armor_categories.description: Physical protective gear that provides Saving Throws against Hits.

armor_categories.name: Screen
armor_categories.description: Energy-based or stealth protective devices with conditional effects.

armor.name: Battle Dress
armor.description: The character counts as +1 Reactions (maximum 4) and receives a Saving Throw of 5+.
armor.special_rules: The character counts as +1 Reactions (maximum 4) and receives a Saving Throw of 5+.

armor.name: Camo Cloak
armor.description: If character is within 2" of Cover, they are counted as being in Cover. Does not apply if the shooter is within 4".
armor.special_rules: If character is within 2" of Cover, they are counted as being in Cover. Does not apply if the shooter is within 4".

armor.name: Deflector Field
armor.description: Automatically deflects a single ranged weapon's Hit per battle. After a Hit is scored, decide if you wish to use the field before any rolls for Toughness or armor are made.
armor.special_rules: Automatically deflects a single ranged weapon's Hit per battle. After a Hit is scored, decide if you wish to use the field before any rolls for Toughness or armor are made.

armor.name: Flak Screen
armor.description: All Area weapons striking the wearer, whether through the initial shots or additional attacks from the Area trait have their Damage reduced by -1 (to a cap of +0).
armor.special_rules: All Area weapons striking the wearer, whether through the initial shots or additional attacks from the Area trait have their Damage reduced by -1 (to a cap of +0).

armor.name: Flex-Armor
armor.description: If the character did not move on their last activation, they count as +1 Toughness (to a maximum of 6).
armor.special_rules: If the character did not move on their last activation, they count as +1 Toughness (to a maximum of 6).

armor.name: Frag Vest
armor.description: The wearer receives a 6+ Saving Throw, improved to 5+ against any Area attack.
armor.special_rules: The wearer receives a 6+ Saving Throw, improved to 5+ against any Area attack.

armor.name: Screen Generator
armor.description: Receives a 5+ Saving Throw against gunfire. No effect against Area or Melee attacks.
armor.special_rules: Receives a 5+ Saving Throw against gunfire. No effect against Area or Melee attacks.

armor.name: Stealth Gear
armor.description: Enemies firing from a range over 9" are -1 to Hit.
armor.special_rules: Enemies firing from a range over 9" are -1 to Hit.

armor_traits.name: Armor
armor_traits.description: Physical protective equipment. A character may wear only one piece of armor.

armor_traits.name: Screen
armor_traits.description: Energy or stealth-based protection. A character may wear only one screen.
